classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'LETTRE D'INFORMATION POUR LA PARTICIPATION A UNE RECHERCHE CLINIQUE' and 'FORMULAIRE DE CONSENTEMENT' with signature blocks for both participant and physician. It describes the VIRTUOSE trial, risks, benefits, patient rights, and ends with a formal consent signature page—hallmarks of an Informed Consent Form (ICF).

trial_title: Efficacité du sildénafil sur la distance maximale de marche chez les patients atteints d'artériopathie oblitérante des membres inférieurs et présentant une claudication intermittente
indication: Artériopathie oblitérante des membres inférieurs (AOMI) avec claudication intermittente
summary: This is an Informed Consent Form (ICF) for the VIRTUOSE trial, a Phase III, national, multicenter, prospective, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study testing the efficacy of sildenafil on maximum walking distance in patients with peripheral arterial disease (PAD) and intermittent claudication. The sponsor is CHU de Rennes. The document informs patients about study objectives, procedures (including treadmill tests, quality of life questionnaires, and optional biomarker sub-study at Rennes), risks (headache, flushing, digestive issues, priapism), benefits, voluntary participation, data privacy rights, and insurance. Participation duration is 13 months. 220 patients are planned for enrollment across French hospitals.
references_to: Comité de Protection des Personnes Ile-de-France 8 de Boulogne-Billancourt avis favorable le 12/10/2020
